content.text:
What would it mean about me... I mean, it would mean I wasn't ready. That I -- that they made a mistake giving me this role. Which is -- I mean that's not going to happen, I'm going to be prepared, that's why I'm doing all this. That's the whole point of the 110%. 

But I should be able to handle this, right? Like other people get promoted and they don't fall apart. I'm just -- I need a system. If I had a better system I wouldn't be in this situation.
